hooks.command: cat .claude/bootstrap/BOOT.md 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; cat memory/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No daily note yet.'; echo '---'; cat memory/decisions-pending.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No pending decisions.'
echo '⚠️ COMPACTING: Write today work to memory/ before compression!'
